/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libJoystickInterface.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libJoystickInterface.so CMakeFiles/JoystickInterface.dir/JoystickInterface.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -L/usr/lib64 -lmagic -ldaemon /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
